title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Equitas Small Finance Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Equitas Small Finance Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Equitas Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Bhubaneswar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Equitas Small Finance Bank:
Equitas Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Equitas Small Finance Bank!
